message.example: User does not belong to this tenant
API key not found or already revoked

apiKey.description: Raw key shown once at creation. Store it securely.

file.description: Binary file stream in multipart field named file

metadata.description: JSON-stringified object. Parsed and saved under metadata.custom.

post.description: Sends a one-time password to the provided email if the account is not already registered. Cooldown is enforced to prevent abuse.

value.message: OTP sent to email if it is not already registered

429.description: Cooldown/rate limit active for OTP resend

value.message: Please wait before requesting another OTP

post.description: Creates a user and default tenant using email OTP verification. Returns access and refresh tokens in both body and cookies.

get.description: Fetches current user profile and tenant memberships from access token context.

value.message: Unauthorized: invalid or expired access token

post.description: Generates a fresh access token bound to a selected tenant. Required before tenant-scoped endpoints unless activeTenantId is already present in JWT.

403.description: User is not a member of the requested tenant

post.description: Accepts refresh token in request body or refreshToken cookie and rotates both tokens.

400.description: Refresh token missing from body and cookies

post.description: Resets password for a user identified by the reset token.
Logs out current user session and clears auth cookies. Accepts optional refresh token in body.

post.summary: Upload an asset with API key
post.description: Machine-to-machine multipart upload endpoint. Accepts file stream plus optional folder/path and metadata.

201.description: Asset accepted and queued for processing

400.description: Malformed multipart fields or missing file

value.message: File is required in form field "file"

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired API key

403.description: Tenant inactive or plan image limit reached

value.message: Image limit reached (1000 assets for Pro plan)

500.description: Upload persisted but queue processing failed

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant ObjectId. Optional when access token already contains activeTenantId, required otherwise.

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant ObjectId. Optional when access token already contains activeTenantId, required otherwise.

delete.description: Owner/admin only endpoint. Marks asset status as deleted.

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant ObjectId. Optional when access token already contains activeTenantId, required otherwise.

patch.description: Owner/admin only endpoint to update processing state.

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant ObjectId. Optional when access token already contains activeTenantId, required otherwise.
